Data logging session management, command implementation, endpoint handling, storage, and syscalls for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[data_logging_service.h](data_logging_service.h.md)**: Header file for managing data logging sessions, including initialization, session creation, and data transmission.
- **[dls_command.c](dls_command.c.md)**: Implements commands for listing, showing, erasing, and sending data logging sessions.
- **[dls_endpoint.c](dls_endpoint.c.md)**: Handles data logging sessions, including opening, closing, sending data, and managing session timeouts.
- **[dls_endpoint.h](dls_endpoint.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, opening, closing, and sending data in a data logging session.
- **[dls_list.c](dls_list.c.md)**: Manages data logging sessions with functions for session creation, locking, unlocking, and validation.
- **[dls_list.h](dls_list.h.md)**: Functions for managing data logging sessions, including creation, deletion, and session validation.
- **[dls_main.c](dls_main.c.md)**: Manages data logging sessions, including creation, sending, and storage operations for Pebble firmware.
- **[dls_private.h](dls_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures, constants, and functions for managing data logging sessions in Pebble firmware.
- **[dls_storage.c](dls_storage.c.md)**: Manages data logging storage, including file operations, session management, and error handling for Pebble firmware.
- **[dls_storage.h](dls_storage.h.md)**: Functions for managing data logging storage, including read, write, invalidate, and rebuild operations.
- **[dls_syscalls.c](dls_syscalls.c.md)**: Defines syscalls for creating, finishing, and logging data in a data logging session.
